name: io.github.AlgoVaultFi/crypto-quant-signal-mcp
title: AlgoVault — Crypto Quant Trade Calls
description: The trade-call intelligence layer for AI trading agents — composite quant calls across 5 exchanges (Hyperliquid, Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget), cross-venue arb, regime-aware classification, and a 20-skill catalog via MCP.
